detail: Intraday add may open only after a deliberate frontier shift, not because reduce is already finished.
Reduce must stay frozen_mainline and may not quietly reopen during add startup.
The four local rebound-residue seeds remain maintenance only and must not expand into fresh reduce tuning.
Board cooling lockout remains an upstream veto before any intraday add exploration can claim permission.
Local-only rebound remains negative evidence and cannot be repackaged as add authorization.
Even after add research begins, board revival unlock is still required before any stronger authority claims.
Intraday add opens as a new supervision frontier rather than an execution-facing lane.
Intraday add must not inherit reduce execution authority or sell-side binding claims.
Program master status must be refreshed when the frontier eventually shifts from deferred to opened.
